name: Arnold TradingView Overlay
description: Closed-trade widgets render reliably again — disableSave override was causing TV to reject long_position widget creation with 'Value is undefined' on newer builds. Earlier: original 1R stop band always visible (R:R=2 stays correct through trail walks), separate dashed trail line at the actually-placed stop, 5-step heatmap zone palette (slate→indigo→fuchsia→orange→red), paint threshold hides hierarchy<0.5 single-family zones, promise-rejection labels surface in /api/tv-overlay/debug error field, pyramid size in header, halt amber recolor, exit_reason suffix.
